hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Talk about fixed plans in your diary with the present continuous for future -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- Making Arrangements -- Present Continuous for Future
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 18 -- Making Arrangements

listenings.text: Hi, I am Rachel. Let me tell you about my week. It is all in my diary. On Monday, I am meeting the client at 10 AM. On Tuesday, I am attending the data review with the team. On Wednesday, I am hosting a small workshop for two new analysts. On Thursday, we are presenting the results to my manager at 3 PM. I am not working on Friday, because I am taking one day off. I have one free slot on Wednesday afternoon, so I can confirm a quick call with you. It is a full week, but everything is arranged.

Hello, this is Danilo. Let me give you my plans for this week, straight from my calendar. On Monday morning, I am meeting two clients to talk about the new pipeline. On Tuesday, I am running a demo for the team at 2 PM. On Wednesday, I am attending a budget meeting, and I am inviting Rachel to join. On Thursday, I am hosting a call with our partners in the United States. I am not presenting on Friday, because we are postponing that to next week. I have one open slot on Thursday, so let us confirm our one to one then. Everything is in the diary.
